_comment: This file tells the unified-build workflow which org contains the source repos. When you fork this manifest repo, this file travels with it automatically — no manual setup needed.
_override_org_comment: Set this to build from a DIFFERENT org than source_org. Leave empty to use source_org. Example: 'my-company' to build from my-company/eVera instead of embeddedos-org/eVera

fork_mode.description: Fork this repo to any org. Set source_org to the org that owns the repos you want to build. Set override_org to force a different org at runtime.
how_to_fork: 2. Edit manifest-config.json: set source_org to your org name
3. Add GH_TOKEN secret with read access to your repos
4. Push to master — CI will build from your org automatically
5. To build from embeddedos-org repos without forking them, keep source_org as embeddedos-org and add a GH_TOKEN with read access to embeddedos-org

tiers.1: Core OS layer — EoS RTOS, eBoot, eAI, eDB, eIPC, eosllm
tiers.2: Platform tools — EoSim, EoStudio, eVera, eBrowser, eCAD
tiers.3: Application layer — eOffice, eApps, HEALTH-BAND-Neuro, HealthKey-Ulta, eNI
